data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The website simplifies decision-making by minimizing choices on each page, achieving a faster response from users.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are placed thoughtfully to reduce the distance for users, enhancing usability on touch and click interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Optimized click/touch target sizes, Intuitive proximity positioning

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing interface is used to create a perception of easier use and positive experience.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: The site leverages familiar design patterns to reduce the learning curve for users visiting from other sites.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI patterns, Familiar navigation layouts

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements are grouped together based on relation to make the interface more organized and intuitive.
data.technical_spec: Grid layouts, Clear separation of content areas
